global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with a clear focus on a flash sale promotion.
global.main_message: Promoting a flash sale with a strong call to action.

elements.label: Orange background
elements.description: A vibrant orange background that fills the entire canvas, providing a warm and inviting atmosphere.

elements.label: BoltCart logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'BoltCart' in a bold font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Flash sale headline
elements.description: A prominent headline that reads 'Flash sale live' in large, bold white letters, centered in the middle of the ad.

elements.label: Shop bestsellers text
elements.description: A smaller text below the headline that says 'Shop bestsellers now' in a clean, readable font.

elements.label: Circular icons
elements.description: Two simple circular icons positioned near the headline, adding a decorative touch to the design.

elements.label: Book now button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom of the ad with the text 'Book now' in bold, inviting white letters on an orange background.
elements.text_content: Flash sale live Shop bestsellers now

elements.label: Call to action text
elements.description: The text 'Book now' is prominently displayed on the button, encouraging immediate action.

elements.label: BoltCart headline
elements.description: The logo text 'BoltCart' is displayed at the top in a bold, modern font, establishing brand identity.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, bright and modern, flash sale, BoltCart
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the headline and body text in the center, with the CTA button at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Flash sale live, Shop bestsellers now, Book now, BoltCart
